gradeDescription: B = I practiced consistent good behaviour.
whatIDidToday: played with as many buddies as possible
noteworthyComments:
Happy Tuesday-yay! 🎉😄  
What a blast of a day! 💥 We zoomed around outside 🌳🐕💨, had so much fun on the agility course 🐾🏃‍♂️, and even practiced our thresholds 🚪✋ (no bolting out the doors—woohoo! 🙌). Such amazing progress all around 🌟💯. What a fun-filled Tuesday! 🐾
